feedback: The OTT bundle services are the standout feature of this operator. My Rs 249 plan includes Voot which gives me access to thousands of movies and shows at no extra charge. The activation is automatic with plan recharge and streaming quality is consistently good even on mobile networks.

Standard recharge plan and coverage in Powai is also just average. Both the plan structure and the network experience are middling without any standout quality. The flexibility in plan options accommodates various budget levels well.
Recharge options are limited and not flexible enough.
The Rs 299 plan is just about adequate.

The ott bundle that was supposed to include sun nxt is practically useless. the subscription only gives access to a tiny fraction of the actual content library and is restricted to mobile screen only. u cannot cast to tv or shr with family, this is not the real sun nxt experience they advertise
OTT average but plan is overpriced.
Standard telecom plan. No strong opinions.

The OTT perks with this plan are genuinely useful unlike some operators who bundle obscure apps nobody wants. Getting Zee5 which I actually use daily makes this plan excellent value. The streaming works flawlessly with no quality compromises or limited content access.
plan great but utube premium restricted and speed average

I chose this plan specifically for the Netflix benefit but it has been nothing but frustration. The Netflix subscription keeps deactivating every few days requiring me to go through a tedious reactivation process through the app. Half the time the activation fails and I miss shows I want to watch.
Plan terrible OTT broken and internet painfully slow.

Plan is average but the Gaana bundlee has completely stopped activating after my last recharge. The core plan features work fine but the promised streaming benefit is currently broken. The flexibility in plan options accommodates various budget levels well.
Rs 149 plan has too short 24 day validity.
No good affordable plan available for light users.

The ott perks with this plan r genuinely useful unlike some operators who bundle obscure apps nobody wants. getting prime video which i actually use daily makes this plan excellent value. the streaming works flawlessly with no quality compromises or limited content access
Rs 199 plan is perfect and Lionsgate Play included is a bonus.

The OTT bundle included with my plan is genuinely one of the best perks in Indian telecom right now. Getting free Prime Video and Netflix subscriptions saves me over Rs 500 monthly that I would otherwise spend on separate streeming subscriptions. The content qlity is excellent and activation was seamless.
Recharge plans are functional. Industry standard.

i chose this plan specifically for the lionsgate play benefit but it has been nothing but frustration, the lionsgate play subscription keeps deactivating ev few days requiring me to go through a tedious reactivation process through the app, half the time the activation fails and i miss shows i want to watch
Rs 799 plan has too short 56 day validity.

The plan features are excellent at Rs 299 but Zee5 is restricted to SD only and internet speed is mediocre in Powai. Good plan design but the execution on streaming and speed lets it down. I appreciate the transparency in plan design without hidden conditions.

OTT bundle is excellent and the plan includes good data balance for streaming. custmer support was also helpful when I had an activation issue with Zee5. Positive exprnce across all three touchpoints. Having entertainment bundled eliminates the need for separate subscriptions.

The OTT bundle services are the standout feature of this operator. My Rs 399 plan includes Gaana which gives me access to thousands of movies and shows at no extra charge. The activation is automatic with plan recharge and streaming quality is consistently good even on mobile networks.

Plan is average but the Voot bundle has completely stopped activating after my last recharge. The core plan features work fine but the promised streaming benefit is currently broken. The flexibility in plan options accommodates various budget levels well.
the rs 149 plan gives v little data daily

The OTT bundle with Gaana included in my plan is average. It works for casual viewing and the content selection is decent enough for something that comes free with a recharge. Not the kind of experience that makes you cancel your paid subscriptions but acceptable as an added bonus.

Plan is standard but the Voot bundlee keeps deactivating which is frustrating. The recharge plan features are adequate but the unreliable OTT access diminishes the overall package. I appreciate the transparency in plan design without hidden conditions.
OTT average but plan is overpriced in Chandigarh.

The Rs 199 plan is overpriced with inadequate 1.5GB daily data and the Aha subscription included is a heavily restricted version with limited content. Both the plan features and the OTT bundlee fail to deliver value at this price point.

the recharge plan at rs 399 is standard nothing remarkable but the netflix bundlee included is genuinely excellent with full catalog access and hd streaming, average plan but great entertainment bonus, i appreciate the transprncy in plan design without hidden conditions

The OTT bundlee promised with my Rs 699 plan has been a complete letdown. The Voot access provided is a stripped down mobile-only version with limited content and SD qlity. Meanwhile the plan advertising shows HD streeming and full catalog access. Classic false advertising tactics.
OTT great plan good and customer support helpful.
Good variety of recharge plans available here.
The plan at Rs 799 is mediocre overall.
OTT bundle broken and plans are too expensive.

The OTT bundle is fine. Not amazing not terrible. Netflix has some content I watch occasionally but it is not a primary reason I stay with this operator. It is a nice to have rather than a must have feature. Average implementation of a standard industry practice.
Best plan with best OTT bundlee in the market.
The cheapest plan is still too expensive now.
Average plan and OTT bundle is good.
Overpriced plan useless YouTube Premium and terrible value.
Terrible plan and OTT bundlee does not even work.
Terrible plan and OTT bundlee does not even work in Bhopal.

Everything is bad. Expensive plan at Rs 399 with restricted Disney+ Hotstar access and terrible value for money compared to what competitors offer. Not a single redeeming quality to this package. I appreciate the transparency in plan design without hidden conditions.
Recharge plans need a complete overhaul desperately.
Gaana not working and plan is too costly.
Plans are inferior to what competitors offer.

The Rs 499 recharge plan is perfectly designed with generous 3GB daily data and the Lionsgate Play subscription included as a bonus makes it unbeatable value. Both the plan features and the entertainment bundlee exceed what any competitor offers at this price.

I am extremely happy with the OTT bundle that comes with my Rs 299 plan. The Disney+ Hotstar subscription works perfectly with full HD streeming and no restrictions on content. This single benefit makes the plan significantly more valuable than competing offers that charge extra for streaming.

The OTT bundle that was supposed to include Zee5 is practically useless. The subscription only gives access to a tiny fraction of the actual content library and is restricted to mobile screen only. You cannot cast to TV or share with family. This is not the real Zee5 experience they advertise.
The Rs 299 plan is standard for the industry.
The Rs 399 plan with 5GB daily is ideal.

the so-called free zee5 subscription with this plan is heavily restricted comprd to a direct subscription, content library is smaller quality is capped at 480p on the bundleed plan and u can only watch on one device, they should be transparent about these limitations in their advertising

The OTT bundlee included with my plan is genuinely one of the best perks in Indian telecom right now. Getting free YouTube Premium and Prime Video subscriptions saves me over Rs 500 monthly that I would otherwise spend on separate streaming subscriptions. The content quality is excellent and activation was seamless.
Average plans. Not impressed not disappointed.
Plan standard but MX Player is genuinely excellent.
Both plan features and streaming bundlee disappoint.

The OTT bundle promised with my Rs 399 plan has been a complete letdown. The JioCinema access provided is a stripped down mobile-only version with limited content and SD quality. Meanwhile the plan advertising shows HD streaming and full catalog access. Classic false advertising tactics.
Ott bundle broken and plans r too expensive in amritsar

Everything about this plan delivers value. The Rs 799 recharge gives generous data the Zee5 bundle adds entertainment and the overall value for money is unmatched among competitors. Three wins in one package. This combination of features and pricing hits the sweet spot for me.
Rs 599 is too much for 3GB daily data.

OTT and plan both average in Kondapur. Nothing stands out positively or negatively about either aspect. Standard telecom offering with standard streeming bundle. Mediocre on both counts. This kind of bundleed value is what keeps me loyal to this operator.

I cannot access YouTube Premium at all despite it being listed as a benefit of my current plan. Every time I try to login through the telecom app it gives error messages. custmer support says to wait for activation but it has been over a week now. The OTT benefit is purely theoretical.
Standard plan and coverage is also average.
Standard recharge options. Nothing stands out.
Disney+ Hotstar not working and plan is too costly.

i specifically chose this plan because of the lionsgate play bundlee inclusion, after calculating what i was spending separately on streaming subscriptions versus getting them free with this telecom plan the savings r substantial, smart bundleing strategy that genuinely benefits customers like me
The Rs 249 plan is perfect for my needs.
Plan perfect Aha bundle great and coverage solid.
Average plan and OTT but call qlity is great.

The OTT bundle promised with my Rs 199 plan has been a complete letdown. The Voot access provided is a stripped down mobile-only version with limited content and SD qlity. Meanwhile the plan advertising shows HD streeming and full catalog access. Classic false advertising tactics.

The entertainment bundlee is what sold me on this operator. Free Voot access with my recharge plan means I can stream movies shows and live sports without paying separately. The content library is extensive and the streaming quality is excellent even on mobile data.

The Voot bundle is average with limited content but the plan itself is overpriced at Rs 349 for only 1.5GB daily. Neutral on streaming but negative on plan economics. Having entertainment bundled eliminates the need for separate subscriptions.
Plans offer great data and calls at Rs 249.

The Voot bundle that comes with the plan is useless because the streaming quality is terrible even when my internet speed is fine. It buffers constantly on the bundled access while working perfectly when I log in with my paid subscription. They clearly throttle bundled OTT streaming.
Recharge plans need a complete overhaul desperately in Ludhiana.

The JioCinema bundle is fine acceptable content and qlity. But intrenet speed in Indiranagar is too slow to stream properly which makes the OTT benefit pointless. Average bundle useless speed. The OTT benefit alone makes this plan competitive in the market.

I am extremely happy with the ott bundle that comes with my rs 599 plan. the utube premium subscription works perfectly with full hd streaming and no restrictions on content. this sinot gonna liee benefit makes the plan significantly more valuable than competing offers that charge extra for streaming

the ott perks with this plan r genuinely useful unlike some operators who bundle obscure apps nobody wants, getting mx player which i actually use daily makes this plan excellent value, the streaming works flawlessly with no quality compromises or limited content access
the options r okay for basic needs

The Lionsgate Play benefit is standard across the industry now and this operator is neither better nor worse than others in this regard. The content is accessible the qlity is acceptable and it works without major issues. A neutral addition that does not significantly influence my choice of operator.

The OTT services bundleed with this plan keep changing without notification. I signed up because Netflix was included but they quietly replaced it with Voot which I have no interest in. The bait and switch approach to OTT bundlees destroys trust with customers who chose plans based on specific inclusions.
Plans have gotten worse after the recent revision.

The so-called free Aha subscription with this plan is heavily restricted compared to a direct subscription. Content library is smaller quality is capped at 480p on the bundleed plan and you can only watch on one device. They should be transparent about these limitations in their advertising.
Good plan but the OTT bundle is useless.
Bad plan but at least Spotify works great.
